privileged_info_summary: The royal_family_tree task uses accurate genealogical data from the British Royal House of Windsor, comprising 25 family members across 4 generations. All 25 names (Elizabeth, Philip, Charles, Camilla, Anne, Timothy, Andrew, Sarah, Edward, Sophie, William, Catherine, Harry, Meghan, Peter, Zara, Beatrice, Eugenie, Louise, James, George, Charlotte, Louis, Archie, Lilibet) and their birth years are factually correct and verified against Wikipedia sources. The CSV data contains 44 total edges (30 parent-child, 14 spouse relationships), exceeding the minimum threshold of 20. The data represents the actual British Royal Family genealogy and relationships, including marriages, parent-child lineage, and spanning from Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip (Generation 1) through their great-grandchildren (Generation 4).
